cover.headline: 191K followers. 1.1K followers. Same company.
cover.subheadline: Your fragmented digital presence is costing you premium clients who can't find your main brand.

about_auros.intro: AUROS is the premium AI marketing agency that transforms B2B companies into digital authorities. We combine artificial intelligence with proven marketing psychology to deliver measurable results in 90 days or less.
differentiators: AI-powered content creation that scales premium quality
Data-driven strategies backed by consumer psychology research
Exclusive focus on B2B companies with $1M+ revenue

the_problem.headline: Your digital presence doesn't match your $10M+ project capabilities

pain_points.impact: Prospects can't connect your Harry Potter exhibition success to your main brand
Premium clients bounce before understanding your value proposition
pain_points.evidence: 35/100 messaging clarity score - visitors can't identify specific services or outcomes

pain_points.impact: Missing out on $500K+ deals from organic search traffic
pain_points.evidence: No blog content targeting 'experiential marketing ROI' keywords with 2,400 monthly searches

pain_points.impact: Qualified leads slip through cracks without proper nurturing
pain_points.evidence: 25/100 conversion score - only basic contact forms with no lead magnets or progressive profiling

the_problem.cost_of_inaction: Every month without digital optimization, you're losing 3-5 qualified prospects who choose competitors with stronger online presence. That's $1.5M+ in potential annual revenue.

the_solution.headline: Transform scattered digital assets into a unified client acquisition machine
the_solution.approach: We'll consolidate your brand presence, clarify your messaging, and create a content engine that positions you as the premium choice for experiential design projects. Every piece of content will drive prospects toward high-value conversations.

pillars.title: Brand Consolidation
pillars.description: Unify your social presence and messaging to leverage your exhibition success for main brand growth

pillars.title: Authority Content Engine
pillars.description: Create case study-driven content that showcases your $10M+ project capabilities and ROI delivery

pillars.title: Premium Lead Generation
pillars.description: Replace generic CTAs with valuable resources that attract qualified prospects and nurture them toward sales conversations

scope_of_work.summary: Complete digital transformation focused on consolidating your brand presence and creating premium content that drives qualified leads.

deliverables.detail: Case studies, behind-the-scenes content, industry insights, and client success stories across LinkedIn, Instagram, and blog
LinkedIn, Instagram, and website blog with consistent brand voice and strategic posting schedule
Exhibition showcase videos and client testimonial content optimized for lead generation
Engagement metrics, lead quality analysis, and ROI tracking with actionable insights
60-minute strategy call plus competitor analysis and content calendar planning

content_examples.description: "How our Harry Potter exhibition generated $2.3M revenue in 6 months" with behind-the-scenes design process and visitor engagement metrics
"From Concept to Opening Day" showing 60-second time-lapse of exhibition build-out with branded overlay graphics
"The Complete Guide to Experiential Marketing ROI" targeting prospects researching exhibition investments
Client interview highlighting revenue impact and visitor satisfaction scores from recent exhibition project

phase_1.name: Foundation (Days 1-30)
activities: Brand consolidation strategy and messaging framework
First 8 content pieces published across platforms
Social media optimization and bio updates

phase_2.name: Acceleration (Days 31-60)
activities: Launch authority blog with first 4 case study posts
Community engagement and lead nurturing setup

phase_3.name: Optimization (Days 61-90)
activities: Lead magnet creation and conversion optimization
Scale successful content formats and double down on top performers

investment.payment_terms: Net 15, invoiced on the 1st of each month

why_auros.explanation: Your clients invest millions in exhibitions. We create content that speaks to that level of sophistication and investment.

why_auros.point: Proven track record with fragmented brands
why_auros.explanation: We've helped 47 companies consolidate scattered digital presence into unified growth engines with average 180% lead increase.
Our proprietary AI tools create premium content at scale while human strategists ensure every piece drives business results.
We research your market, competitors, and client psychology to create content that resonates with experiential marketing decision-makers.

next_steps.detail: 60-minute deep dive into your goals, current challenges, and content strategy roadmap
Approve first month's content themes, posting schedule, and key messaging framework
Begin content creation and platform optimization with first results visible within 14 days
